key_themes: Revenue sharing and on-chain AI utilities
Recent price momentum in low-volume environment
summary: PaLM AI ($PALM) is a micro-cap (~$2.7-2.8M) Ethereum-based AI project offering chatbots, image generation, and on-chain/Web3 integrations with revenue sharing for holders. Social sentiment on X is predominantly bullish, with users calling out the token in altcoin lists, stating they are buying for the long term, and noting "all eyes on $Palm" amid recent 5-10% price gains, though volume remains very low and the token is down significantly from its 2024 ATH. Separate positive corporate news about a different Palm (business identity platform) securing Amex Ventures investment adds to the overall constructive tone, but the asset stays high-risk/speculative.
sources: 10+ recent X posts (keyword search for $PALM since Mar 2026), 8 semantic search results on AI crypto sentiment, CoinMarketCap, CoinGecko, and project site (palmai.tech), 5+ web articles on PaLM AI price/project and Amex Ventures investment in Palm platform
